title: SEO overhaul, tooltip widget, comparison pages, and data fixes
features: Embeddable tooltip widget — add Wowhead-style hoverable tooltips to any website with a single script tag, supporting all 13 entity types (cards, relics, potions, characters, monsters, powers, events, encounters, enchantments, keywords, orbs, afflictions, achievements)
Developer documentation page at /developers — widget installation guide, full API endpoint reference, code examples in cURL/Python/JavaScript, and link to interactive Swagger docs
Character hub pages — expanded character detail pages with collapsible sections for all character-specific cards (grouped by rarity) and character pool relics

Character comparison pages at /compare — 10 character pair comparisons with side-by-side stats, card pool breakdowns by type and rarity, keyword distribution charts, and starting deck/relic comparison
Keyword hub pages at /keywords — dedicated pages for each keyword (Exhaust, Ethereal, Innate, Retain, Sly, Eternal, Unplayable) listing all cards with that keyword, with search and character filter

Compendium sort order — cards, relics, and potions now support sorting by in-game compendium order (pool → rarity → ID for cards, rarity → name for relics/potions), with A-Z, Z-A, and Compendium sort options
Cross-language entity names — collapsible 'Other languages' section on all detail pages showing localized names across all 14 supported languages
Related cards section on card detail pages — shows cards sharing the same keywords or tags
Card keyword badges now link to keyword hub pages
High-resolution renders of Neow (2048x2048) and Tezcatara (2048x2048) from Spine skeletal animations, plus reusable render_hires.mjs script for rendering any skeleton at high resolution
fixes: 19 inherited powers (DyingStarPower, FlexPotionPower, etc.) now display correct type (Buff/Debuff), stack type (Counter), and description instead of showing empty data
3 abstract base power classes (TemporaryStrengthPower, TemporaryDexterityPower, TemporaryFocusPower) removed from output — they are not real in-game powers (260 → 257 powers)
Upgraded starter relics (Black Blood, Ring of the Drake, Divine Destiny, Phylactery Unbound, Infused Core) now assigned to their correct character pool instead of 'shared'

Event choice ordering now matches the in-game order from C# source instead of alphabetical sorting (fixes Slippery Bridge showing Hold On before Overcome, Doors of Light and Dark showing Dark before Light, etc.)
Sitemap changed from generateSitemaps() index to flat XML — Next.js 16 did not auto-generate sitemap index, causing /sitemap.xml to 404
Sitemap set to force-dynamic to avoid empty results when API is unavailable during Docker build (15 URLs → 1,384 URLs)
Navbar labels updated to match in-game compendium names (Card Library, Relic Collection, Bestiary, Potion Lab)
api_changes: New endpoint: GET /api/names/{entity_type}/{entity_id} — returns localized entity names across all 14 languages
New field: compendium_order on Card, Relic, and Potion schemas — integer matching in-game compendium sort position
Cards endpoint now supports ?tag= query parameter for filtering by card tag (Strike, Defend, Minion, etc.)
FAQPage JSON-LD schema added to all 6 detail page types (cards, relics, potions, monsters, powers, events)
VideoGame JSON-LD schema added to home page
Developers link added to footer navigation
